summary: Test suite thoroughly validates core secret rotation logic (identifySecretStatus, generateReport, formatters) with good organization and clear fixtures. However, it lacks critical coverage: no tests for main.ts CLI entry point, argument parsing, file I/O, or error handling paths—all explicit requirements. Formatter tests are superficial (check string presence, not exact output). Boundary testing exists but incompletely (missing empty arrays, negative values, future dates, malformed input). Would catch regressions in core library functions but miss bugs in CLI interface and error scenarios.
